meta.title: Forecast & scenario model — bull / base / bear
meta.label: Scenario projection (tier D) — not a forecast of fact
meta.disclaimer: Scenario projection, not a forecast of fact; anchored to cited comps. Yearly cells are scenario outputs; only the labelled inputs (addressable states, per-capita spend, ARPPU band, take rate, exit multiples, comp cross-checks) trace to a cited fact.
meta.methodology: Each case extends the synthesis three-case framing into a Year 1-5 KPI build. ARPPU is a MONTHLY figure on the Skillz basis, so annual net revenue = paying users (PMAU, thousands) x ARPPU x 12. GMV = net revenue / take rate. EBITDA-ish = net revenue x (1 - S&M% - 40%), where 40% is a single simplifying charge for all other opex (payments, platform fees, G&A, tech; India counterparty labour is immaterial per wsf-toast-per-hand-model). Ramp curves (state rollout, user growth) are the scenario assumption: bull compounds into the empty casino x real-time quadrant with ARPPU breaking above the Skillz band; base is a niche operator with ARPPU stuck in the $59-70 band and Skillz-like CAC; bear takes a Year-3 enforcement / platform / India kill-shot that truncates the revenue path. Terminal net revenue reconciles to synthesis.md: bull ~$397M, base ~$148M, bear impaired.
meta.kpiFormula: netRevenue($M) = payingUsersK x ARPPU x 12 / 1000 ; GMV($M) = netRevenue / (takeRatePct/100) ; ebitda($M) = netRevenue x (1 - sAndMPctRevenue/100 - 0.40)

units.payingUsersK: paying monthly active users, thousands (PMAU basis)
units.arppu: average revenue per paying user, USD per month (Skillz basis)
units.takeRatePct: % of GMV retained as net revenue (rake)
units.gmv: gross marketplace volume, USD millions (entry fees / handle)
units.netRevenue: net revenue, USD millions (= GMV x take rate)
units.sAndMPctRevenue: sales & marketing as % of net revenue

bull.label: Bull
bull.story: Blackjack is defensible at the optimistic end of the range, platforms stay neutral, casino-style play lifts ARPPU above the casual-skill ceiling, and Toast is alone in its quadrant long enough to compound liquidity into a durable network.
bull.arppuThesis: ARPPU breaks above the Skillz $59-70 band as casino-stakes play monetises high-value US players (density echo of DraftKings iGaming at ~2.3x sportsbook, wsf-dkng-igaming-revenue-density).

crossChecks.note: Terminal net revenue ~$397M tops the $50-400M SOM band and ~= Skillz's all-time peak $384.1M
Terminal GMV ~$2.2B sits inside the implied $2.1-2.6B range (~= Skillz's 2021 peak GMV) at a 15-19% take rate

exit.basis: Top of the defensible 0.5-1.5x illustrative band.

stretch.label: DraftKings-parity stretch
stretch.basis: Explicitly above the defensible band: DKNG's 2.23x prices license-hardened multi-vertical scale on $6.29B revenue that a pre-seed single-product entrant has no analog to.

base.label: Base
base.story: The doctrine haircut is real, cold-start friction and CAC bite the way they bit Skillz, ARPPU never leaves the historical band, and Toast lands as a mid-single-digit-share niche operator rather than a category-definer.
base.arppuThesis: ARPPU stays inside the flat $59-70 band Skillz never escaped (wsf-skillz-fy2023-results $70, wsf-skillz-fy2024-results $68.70); the dealer-vs-player mechanic does some incremental work but not enough to escape the niche.

crossChecks.note: Terminal ~$148M revenue and ~181K PMAU land at roughly Skillz's post-collapse 2023 scale (179K PMAU); GMV ~$985M ~= Skillz 2023 GMV $963.6M
Above Skillz's $95.5M trough; near Papaya's press-estimated ~$150M

exit.basis: At-to-above Skillz/Firy's current distressed 0.68x EV/Sales, up to ~1.0x.

bear.label: Bear
bear.story: A single-product, pre-scale, iOS-only company meets any one of four precedented kill-shots (state-AG sham-P2P action, integrity/false-advertising exposure, an App-Store casino-games reinterpretation, or the India supply/AML shock). A Year-3 shock truncates the revenue path rather than trimming it.
bear.arppuThesis: Revenue builds through Year 2, then a kill-shot cuts PMAU and rake; the line settles at a rump that is a fraction of both its own peak and the base case.

crossChecks.note: Category precedent for a legally-triggered write-off: Flutter took a $556M impairment on Junglee Games when India's 2025 law forced it to stop real-money play
Skillz/Firy's current distressed 0.68x EV/Sales is a CEILING for the downside multiple, not a floor

exit.basis: Multiple compresses below 0.5x; equity impaired toward zero, invested capital largely at risk. Not a haircut to the base case, a step-change.
